name: upcart
description: UpCart (AfterSell) slide-out cart drawer for Shopify themes. Use when a task involves the cart drawer / mini-cart / slide cart, in-cart upsells or 'Frequently Bought Together', the free-shipping / rewards progress meter, in-cart subscription or frequency selectors, or free-gift-with-purchase inside the cart. UpCart OWNS the cart UI: it renders in the storefront (light DOM by default) with its own classes and is configured mostly in the UpCart dashboard (Custom CSS + Custom HTML modules), so do NOT build or restyle a native theme cart drawer, mini-cart, or slide cart that competes with it. NOT for Shopify checkout, and NOT for the /cart page template unless UpCart is disabled.
